ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the university */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, on leave, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "credit_requirement" INTEGER /* Total credits required to complete the program */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the program */,
  "program_director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_director_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., 19CSC301A) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the course belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course type (e.g., core, elective) */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES course_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the course type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the course is being offered in (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the course is being offered in */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "classroom" TEXT /* Classroom where the course is offered */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the classroom */,
  "enrolled_students" INTEGER /* Number of students currently enrolled in the course offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade is for */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade assigned to the student (e.g., A, B, C, D, F) */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned by the student for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_points" (
  "grade_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade point */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade (e.g., A, B, C, D, F) */,
  "grade_point" REAL /* Grade point value for the grade (e.g., 4.0, 3.0, 2.0, 1.0, 0.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_grades" (
  "student_grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the grade is for */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade assigned to the student (e.g., A, B, C, D, F) */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned by the student for the course */,
  "grade_point" REAL /* Grade point value for the grade (e.g., 4.0, 3.0, 2.0, 1.0, 0.0) */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the grade was earned */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the grade was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Cumulative grade point average (GPA) of the student */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits earned by the student */,
  "current_semester" TEXT /* Current semester of the student */,
  "current_year" INTEGER /* Current year of the student */,
  "total_credits_attempted" INTEGER /* Total credits attempted by the student */,
  "total_credits_passed" INTEGER /* Total credits passed by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the transcript was issued */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or department that issued the transcript */,
  "issued_reason" TEXT /* Reason for issuing the transcript (e.g., job application, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the certificate */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the certificate is for */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate was awarded */,
  "issued_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or department that issued the certificate */,
  "certificate_type" TEXT /* Type of certificate (e.g., degree, honors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
